name: Aoi's Repo
subtitle: Self-made App Repository for LiveContainer, AltStore, & SideStore
description: Welcome to Aoi's Repo! This is a custom AltStore-compatible repository designed to host JIT-enabled applications, emulators, and utility tools for LiveContainer.

apps.name: LiveContainer
apps.subtitle: Run iOS apps inside a container
apps.localizedDescription: LiveContainer allows you to run iOS apps inside a containerized environment. This allows you to bypass the 3-app sideloading limit and use JIT-enabled apps easily.

versions.localizedDescription: Updated LiveContainer with stability fixes and JIT coordination.

apps.name: LcInstaller
apps.subtitle: Direct installer for LiveContainer
apps.localizedDescription: An helper app designed to simplify adding repositories, browsing, and installing IPAs directly into your LiveContainer instance with one-click setup.

versions.localizedDescription: Fixed bundle identifier resolution issues and added community sources support.

apps.name: RetroArch
apps.subtitle: Multi-system game engine emulator
apps.localizedDescription: RetroArch is a frontend for emulators, game engines and media players. It enables you to run classic games on a wide range of computers and consoles using its slick graphical interface.

versions.localizedDescription: Improved core performance and iOS touchscreen controller layouts.

apps.name: PPSSPP
apps.subtitle: PSP Emulator
apps.localizedDescription: PPSSPP is the original and best PSP emulator for mobile devices. It runs a lot of games, but depending on the power of your device all may not run at full speed.

versions.localizedDescription: Fixed rendering issues in various games and optimized JIT compilers.

news.title: Welcome to Aoi's Repo!
news.caption: Enjoy a clean, fast repository experience for LiveContainer.
